sourceSummary.oneLine: Daean Elecom approval sheet for Battery Recharger model DEPS126002, revision 00, approved 2025.07.14.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Defines electrical specifications, applied quality/EMC/safety standards, environmental requirements, and attachments for the Battery Recharger.
keyPoints: Purpose states the document describes and defines electrical specifications, mechanical matters, and environmental matters for a Battery Recharger.
Applied standards include ISO9001: 2000, KS C 9832, KS C 9835, EN 55032, EN 55035, FCC Part 15 B, and IEC 62368-1.
Electrical specification lists adaptor input 100~240VAC, 50/60Hz, output 15VDC / 3A for USB C-type PD, and charger output 12.6VDC at 1.3A for each channel.
Environmental requirements list operating temperature 10℃ to +35℃ and storage temperature -40℃ to +70℃.

entities.name: FCC Part 15, B
entities.evidence: 3-2 EMC KS C 9832 KS C 9835 EN 55032 EN 55035 FCC Part 15, B

evidence.claim: The document is an approval sheet for Battery Recharger model DEPS126002.
evidence.evidenceText: Approval Sheet Description Battery Recharger 승인일자 2025.07.14 Model Name DEPS126002 REVISION 00

evidence.claim: Revision history records Rev 0 at PV step on 2025/07/14 as initial issue.
evidence.evidenceText: Rev Step Date In Charge Revision History Approval 0 PV 2025/07/14 정진환 초도 발행 심상인

evidence.claim: The purpose is to describe and define electrical specifications, mechanical matters, and environmental matters for the Battery Recharger.
evidence.evidenceText: 이 문서는 Battery 충전을 하기 위한 Battery Recharger 에 대한 각종 전기적 Spec, 기구 및 환경 대한 사항을 기술 및 정의하고 있다.

evidence.claim: The quality standard listed is ISO9001: 2000 QUALITY SYSTEMS.
The EMC standards listed are KS C 9832, KS C 9835, EN 55032, EN 55035, and FCC Part 15, B.
evidence.evidenceText: 3-2 EMC KS C 9832 KS C 9835 EN 55032 EN 55035 FCC Part 15, B

evidence.claim: The safety standard listed is IEC 62368-1.
The adaptor output is 15VDC / 3A for USB C-type PD.
evidence.evidenceText: Output Voltage 15VDC / 3A ----- USB C-type PD 용

evidence.claim: The battery pack cell is 11.55V/3330mAh(3S1P), Li-Ion, 38.46Wh.
The charger output voltage is 12.6VDC and output current is 1.3A for each of channels 1 and 2.
evidence.evidenceText: Output Output Voltage 12.6VDC Output Current 1.3A (Channel 1,2 Each)

evidence.claim: The product dimensions are 253.8mm(W) X 191.8mm(L) X 35mm(H).
Operating temperature requirement is 10℃ to +35℃ and storage temperature requirement is -40℃ to +70℃.
Operating humidity requirement is 75%RH / 30℃ or below and storage humidity requirement is 90%RH / 65℃ or below.
The attachments include schematic, PCB drawing, mechanical drawing, BOM, inspection/assembly/packaging work instructions, and label.
evidence.evidenceText: 6. 별첨 - 회로도 - PCB도 - 기구도 - BOM - 검사/조립/포장 작업지도서 - LABEL

reviewFlags.reason: No external regulatory authority or jurisdiction is identified; authorityOrJurisdiction is inferred from the repeated company name Daean Elecom.
Approval date is 2025.07.14, while schematic sheets show dates such as Thursday, July 17, 2025 and Wednesday, January 08, 2025.
OCR/text extraction quality is uneven in later drawing and work-instruction sections, including duplicated sheet titles and apparent misspellings such as RECGAGER, CHAGER, and DMPS-126002.
